task_title: Revert edge rule 'geo-restrict-v42' to dry-run mode to restore customer traffic
provider_instructions: Immediately revert the edge rule 'geo-restrict-v42' from blocking mode back to dry-run mode across all production edge locations for the 'inference-gateway' service. Restore the previous configuration, specifically matching config commit d7f0a5c2, ensuring the rule is set to dry-run (not blocking). Do not remove or disable the rule, and do not modify other edge rules or geo-classification settings. No broader deactivation or model changes are authorized. Confirm completion and accuracy of rollback via change log reference to commit d7f0a5c2, and maintain existing observability/alerting. This action is urgent (sev-1, customer major outage).
